pi_items.source: Verified by analyzing setup_task.sh, which creates the Redmine project using this specific identifier.
Verified by analyzing the task prompt in task.json and the evaluation script in export_result.sh, both of which require this exact note string.
Verified by analyzing setup_task.sh, which explicitly seeds an array of exactly 5 issues to the created project.

privileged_info_summary: The target project identifier is 'office-relocation-2024', which is programmatically generated at task setup with exactly 5 open issues. The expected closing note to be added to all 5 issues is precisely 'Project completed, task cancelled'.
